/usr/bin/cc  -Wall -Wextra -O3 -march=native -flto -s -Wl,-rpath,/home/aarav/LightBase/dist/lib -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/lb-cli.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/lb-cli.dir/src/lb_cli.c.o" "CMakeFiles/lb-cli.dir/src/git_sync.c.o" "CMakeFiles/lb-cli.dir/src/ai_core.c.o" "CMakeFiles/lb-cli.dir/src/crypto_vault.c.o" -o lb-cli  -Wl,-rpath,/home/aarav/LightBase/core/build_release: libcore.so -lssl -lcrypto -lsqlite3 -ldl -lm /usr/lib/quickjs/libquickjs.a -lpthread -lgit2
